parameters.text:
👋 Hi! I'm your Internship Hunt Bot.

Send me your resume as a PDF and I'll:
✅ Parse your skills & profile
🔍 Search top internship portals
📬 Apply to best matches (with your approval)
🔔 Send follow-ups automatically

Send your resume PDF to get started!
📄 Got your resume! Parsing your profile with AI...

nodes.name: AI: Parse Resume
nodes.notes:
Set AI_BASE_URL, AI_API_KEY, AI_MODEL in n8n environment variables.
Claude: https://api.anthropic.com/v1 | OpenAI: https://api.openai.com/v1 | Grok: https://api.x.ai/v1
Model examples: claude-sonnet-4-6 | gpt-4o | grok-3

nodes.name: Search Jobs (JSearch API)
nodes.notes: Uses JSearch on RapidAPI — free tier: 200 req/month. Set RAPIDAPI_KEY env var. Searches LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor combined.

parameters.text:
=🎯 *Match {{ $itemIndex + 1 }} of 5*

🏢 *{{ $json.company }}*
💼 {{ $json.title }}
📍 {{ $json.location }}

_{{ $json.description.slice(0,200) }}..._

✉️ *Cover letter ready* | Score: {{ $json.score }}/10

👇 What should I do?

=📬 *Follow-up ready!*

💼 *{{ $json.title }}* @ *{{ $json.company }}*
Applied 7 days ago — no response yet.

*Suggested follow-up email:*

```
{{ $json.followupEmail }}
```

📋 Copy and send via email/portal. I've marked this as followed up.
